document.title: SHEET-E1X_FRONT_DECOSHEET
document.documentType: Part approval, inspection data, process quality control plan, packing specification, and reliability test record

sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics/Hansung P&I part approval and inspection package for SHEET-E1X_FRONT_DECOSHEET, SEC code MI63-02985A, model S4335-AW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design development output and supplier approval/quality evidence for dimensions, material, printing, adhesion, reliability, packing, process control, outgoing inspection, and hazardous substance checks.
keyPoints: Document Code and SEC Code are MI63-02985A, with Revision 01 and E.D DATE 19/02/22.
The part is SHEET-E1X_FRONT_DECOSHEET for model S4335-AW.
Dimensional specification is width 455.40 mm and height or length 379.40 mm with ±0.3 mm tolerance.
Material is identified as PC EMBO, 무광PC 0.254T, and PC EMBO 0.25T in different sections.
Approval conclusion states 승인 함 and 판정 합격.
Reliability test purpose is high-temperature/high-humidity test, with 판정결과 Pass.
The source states the part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

evidence.claim: The vendor code shown in the approval header is DJ06.
The supplier or vendor is HANSUNG P&I.
The written department is 한성피앤아이.
The part dimensional specification is 455.40 mm by 379.40 mm with ±0.3 mm tolerance.
The material is listed as PC EMBO.
The approval review lists material as matte PC 0.254T.
The outgoing inspection criterion lists material as PC EMBO 0.25T and adhesive specification as ST-9108.
The approval conclusion is approved and pass.
evidence.evidenceText: 결론,  승 인 함,,,    판 정,합 격

evidence.claim: The CTF inspection data used quantity 20 for model S4335-AW and SEC code MI63-02985A.
The CTF results show Cpk of 3.75 for width and 2.19 for length.
The process quality control plan category marks SOP.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category,,,,"□ DVS, □ PVS, □ PRS, ■ SOP"

evidence.claim: The PQCP document number is HS18-0814-03-PQCP.
The PQCP original date is 10/19/17 and revision date is 2019-01-04 (ver 01).
The PQCP includes a product inspection dimensional check for 455.40*379.40±0.3mm.
The packing unit is 1 BOX × 10PACK × 500 = 5,000 EA.
The part unit weight is 73.78 g.
The reliability test report was written on 8/14/18 by 한성P&I quality control.
The reliability test purpose is high-temperature/high-humidity testing and the result is Pass.
The reliability test conditions are 50℃, 95% humidity, and 24 hours.
The reliability test period is 2018-08-11 to 2018-08-14.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
evidence.evidenceText: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: The inspection standard references DUQ1-0022K.
The hazardous substance inspection uses XRF measurement.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authority is inferred only from document ownership and supplier/customer fields.
Multiple dates appear for different included records: E.D DATE 19/02/22, EC dates 10/22/18 and 2/22/19, 작성일 2018.08.14, PQCP Date(Rev.) 2019-01-04, and reliability test dates 2018-08-11~2018-08-14.
Material is expressed in multiple closely related forms: PC EMBO, 무광PC 0.254T, PC SHEET, and PC EMBO 0.25T.
The source is a preprocessed spreadsheet extraction with comma-separated layout artifacts and mixed Korean/English text, so some table relationships may be ambiguous.
